title: SQLite runs in :memory: mode — no persistence across restarts
evidence: db.ts:8 getDb() opens new DatabaseConstructor(":memory:"); server.ts never calls initializeDatabase(path), so the running service loses all data on restart
suggestion: Default the connection to a file path (e.g. books.db) via an env var so data persists; keep :memory: for tests only

title: Unused sql.js dependencies declared
evidence: package.json:14-17 lists sql.js and @types/sql.js as dependencies but no source file imports them (only better-sqlite3 is used in db.ts:1)

title: Agent reported better-sqlite3 native ABI mismatch for server start
evidence: _agent_stdout.log 'Remaining Issue' notes NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127 vs 147; however test_coverage=0.294 and defect_rate=1.0 show tests (which load better-sqlite3 in-memory) passed, so the native addon loaded at test time
suggestion: Confirm `npm start` boots in the target Node runtime; npm rebuild better-sqlite3 if the ABI drifts

title: 404/500 handlers and server bootstrap are untested
evidence: tests.spec.ts covers routes/health only; app.ts:18-33 (404 + error handler) and server.ts have no direct tests, contributing to test_coverage=0.294
suggestion: Add a test for the fallthrough 404 and error handler to raise effective coverage
